creator: hitmaster2k@yahoo.com
text:
i have corrected the above patch from scratch and re-submitting it, this PR can be closed after this patch, and Ah! i have also added a link from computerbits.com for building a fax server on FreeBSD. the patch... if you would like a gzipped version of the patch, the reason is if the tabs /spaces get destroyed... you can also download the patch from: http://us.f1.yahoofs.com/users/ccde5619/bc/docs.sgml.diff.gz?bcOIXZ8AfhaSIhem enter exactly as above... it helps.. :-) =Hiten = the patch.... *** docs.sgml.old Fri Nov 23 15:52:00 2001 --- docs.sgml Mon Dec 10 23:05:31 2001 *************** *** 293,302 **** Ted Mittelstaedt.

These articles cover everything from setting up ! a ! FreeBSD based mail server to doing Network ! Address Translation for other hosts.

--- 293,305 ---- Ted Mittelstaedt.

These articles cover everything from setting up ! a ! FreeBSD based mail server to doing ! ! Network Address Translation for other hosts, and also an article ! on ! ! building a fax server.

*************** *** 381,391 ****

  • The ! Open Directory Project offers an excellent selection of links for FreeBSD, including a list of ! prominent ! users which can be helpful for marketing purposes.

In the real world...

--- 384,394 ----

  • The ! Open Directory Project offers an excellent selection of links for FreeBSD, including a list of ! ! prominent users which can be helpful for marketing purposes.
